description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a red gable roof and white exterior walls, surrounded by lush landscaping and mature trees. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, stonework accents, and a prominent entryway. Large windows are symmetrically arranged, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard boasts a rectangular swimming pool, a patio area, and additional greenery, creating a private outdoor retreat. The property is bordered by hedges and trees, offering privacy from neighboring lots. A driveway leads to the side of the house, connecting to a garage or parking area.
description: A two-story white house with a red gable roof, covered porch, symmetrical windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, columns, and stonework, flanked by landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage area, and the full length of the house, with the pool and patio visible in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, and dense landscaping, as well as the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Alternate front/side view emphasizing the gable roof, front porch, and the transition from driveway to landscaped yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, classical columns, stonework base, and a set of steps leading to a prominent front door.
